## Description

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

Fixes # (issue number, if applicable)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:` commit)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:` commit)
- [ ] Breaking change (`feat!:` commit — bumps major version)
- [ ] Documentation only (`docs:` / `[skip ci]`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore (`chore:` commit)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] Playwright e2e tests pass (if UI was changed)
- [ ] `README.md` updated if the feature affects documentation
- [ ] `README.fr.md` updated to match (both READMEs must stay in sync)
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or secrets committed
- [ ] No `localhost` in config examples or documentation
- [ ] Branch targets `main`
- [ ] Commit messages follow the conventional commit convention

## Screenshots / Demo

If this is a UI change, add a before/after screenshot or short screen recording.
